title: Woods can leave U.S. for treatment, judge rules
content: A Florida judge granted Tiger Woods' request on Wednesday to travel outside the U.S. and enter a comprehensive inpatient treatment facility.

title: Bears' stadium choice 'late spring, early summer'
content: Kevin Warren, president and CEO of the Chicago Bears, says the team is targeting "late spring, early summer" for a decision on where the team's new stadium will be built.

title: Izzo 'seriously' eyed Suns HC job last summer
content: Michigan State basketball head coach Tom Izzo said he "talked seriously" with Suns majority owner Mat Ishbia about Phoenix's head coaching job last summer before the team ultimately hired Jordan Ott.

title: U-M's Cadeau treated for possible allergic reaction
content: Michigan PG Elliot Cadeau is receiving medical attention for a possible allergic reaction and is set to meet the Wolverines in Indianapolis later Wednesday.

title: Ex-Wisconsin TE Pugh dies at 24; cause not given
content: Jack Pugh, a former tight end on Wisconsin's football team who stepped away from football three years ago citing mental health concerns, has died at 24.

title: Judge dismisses Indiana sex abuse lawsuit
content: A federal judge dismissed a lawsuit Tuesday against Indiana University in which former men's basketball players alleged improper sexual conduct by a former team physician because the players' complaint fell far beyond the two-year statute of limitations.

title: Marlins' Alcantara gets 1st complete game of '26
content: The Marlins' Sandy Alcantara threw the first complete game of the MLB season -- a 93-pitch shutout in a 10-0 victory against the White Sox.

content: Roberto Martinez might think it's "worthless" to read into any results ahead of the World Cup, but alarm bells must surely be ringing in the USMNT camp over Christian Pulisic's 14-match goal drought.

title: Oracle layoffs: Company sets this severance condition for laid-off employees
content: Oracle has started its largest-ever layoffs, impacting thousands globally. Employees must sign termination documents via DocuSign to receive severance, which appears less generous than competitors.  These cuts, potentially reaching 30,000, aim to fund a massive AI data center expansion, a move that has placed the company under significant financial strain.

title: LSG vs DC: Sameer Rizvi’s unbeaten 70 guides Delhi Capitals to six-wicket victory
content: Sameer Rizvi's spectacular unbeaten 70, coupled with Tristan Stubbs' solid 39*, orchestrated a stunning turnaround for Delhi Capitals.  After a disastrous start at 26 for 4, the duo forged an unbroken 119-run partnership to chase down Lucknow Super Giants' 141 with ease, securing a memorable six-wicket victory.

title: Rahul Arunoday Banerjee was rescued alive, no doctor was available: Makers on drowning incident
content: The makers of Bengali television serial Bhole Baba Par Karega have issued a statement following the tragic death of actor Rahul Arunoday Banerjee, expressing grief and assuring a transparent inquiry into the incident. Banerjee, 43, passed away on March 29 after allegedly drowning during a shoot at Talsari beach in Odisha’s Baleswar district.

title: Oracle layoffs email to employees has a 'reminder': Tells staff what to do next
content: Tech giant Oracle has initiated its largest-ever job cuts, impacting thousands globally. Employees received immediate termination notices via email on March 31, with access to company systems revoked.  Affected staff were instructed to provide personal email addresses for crucial separation details and severance information, emphasizing the prohibition of retaining confidential data.

title: Twitch streamer Musa_usa left speechless after thief’s mom shows up at his food truck
content: A Twitch streamer in Baltimore, Musa_usa, experienced theft from his tip jar. Days later, the perpetrator's mother visited his food truck. She apologized and returned the stolen money. Musa_usa was touched by her honesty and responsibility. The incident highlights making amends and doing the right thing. The mother's actions brought a peaceful resolution to the situation.

title: Horoscope Today: Daily astrological predictions for April 2, 2026
content: Horoscope Today: Read daily horoscope predictions for April 2, 2026. Know all about the astrological events and influences that will be affecting each of the 12 zodiac signs. Our astrologer has analyzed the movements of the planets and the alignment of the stars to bring you the most accurate and up-to-date horoscope predictions for the day ahead. Get ready to discover what the stars have in store for you today.

title: Intel responds after IRGC threatens attacks on 18 US firms in Middle East
content: Intel has responded to threats from Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) against 18 US firms operating in the Middle East. The IRGC declared these companies legitimate targets following US and Israeli strikes on Iranian soil. Intel stated it is prioritizing the safety of its employees and facilities in the region.

title: IPL turns fiery! Prince vs Stubbs faceoff goes viral in LSG vs DC - Watch
content: A heated moment between Prince Yadav and Tristan Stubbs grabbed attention during the Lucknow Super Giants vs Delhi Capitals clash, as the two exchanged an intense stare-down. Earlier, Delhi bowled out LSG for 141, with Lungi Ngidi and T Natarajan taking three wickets each. Despite efforts from Mitchell Marsh and Abdul Samad, LSG struggled throughout.

title: Brittany Mahomes reacts to Randi Mahomes’ emotional post
content: Brittany Mahomes’ induction into the University of Texas at Tyler Athletics Hall of Fame highlights her own athletic journey, separate from her public life today. A former collegiate standout who briefly played professionally in Iceland, she remains connected to her roots. Her heartfelt speech and the support from Randi Mahomes reflect both personal pride and a continued commitment to uplifting women’s sports.

title: Fact check: Did Druski and Erika Kirk respond to viral skit?
content: Drew “Druski” Desbordes’ viral skit led to rumors of an online clash with Erika Kirk, but no real interaction happened. A fake screenshot showing comments between them spread on X, but it was proven false. No cease-and-desist was sent, and neither Druski nor Erika Kirk has responded publicly to each other.

title: Is Justin Gaethje out vs Ilia Topuria? Arman Tsarukyan hints replacement
content: April 1 once again proved to be one of the most confusing days in combat sports. Rumors spread quickly and fans struggled to separate fact from fiction. This year, the chaos centered around the UFC White House event on June 14. The historic card will feature a blockbuster lightweight title fight between Ilia Topuria and Justin Gaethje. However, a sudden social media post stirred major controversy in MMA fandom.

title: Serena Williams’ husband Alexis Ohanian celebrates as Giannis Antetokounmpo, Alex and Thanasis make rare NBA history with Bucks
content: Alex Antetokounmpo made his NBA debut as he joined brothers Giannis and Thanasis on the Milwaukee Bucks roster. This created history as the first trio of brothers on one active NBA team. Alex scored his first point, calling it a dream moment. Alexis Ohanian also reacted online. The Bucks won 123-99 against the Dallas Mavericks.

title: ​‘Khamenei Love for India was real’: Iranian envoy Illahi recalls memory of Supreme Leader in emotional Lucknow gathering
content: Iran's Supreme Leader's representative, Abdul Majeed Hakeem Ilahi, spoke at Lucknow's Chota Imambara, highlighting Ayatollah Khamenei's profound love for India and its people. Ilahi shared anecdotes of Khamenei's intellectual engagement with India and his simple, selfless leadership, drawing parallels to Imam Hussain. The speech evoked deep emotion, emphasizing a shared bond across communities.

title: Angry fans question why the teaser of Ranbir Kapoor's 'Ramayana' was first launched in LA: 'It’s an Indian movie'
content: The teaser for Ranbir Kapoor's Ramayana has been revealed in Los Angeles. Indian fans are disappointed as the teaser is not yet available in India. It is expected to be released on April 2. This decision has led to online discussions about prioritizing international markets. The film features a star-studded cast including Sai Pallavi, Yash, Sunny Deol, and Kajal Aggarwal.

title: 'Very unfortunate': KKR head coach breaks silence on Cameron Green workload row
content: Abhishek Nayar has termed Cameron Green’s absence with the ball in IPL 2026 as “unfortunate” due to a back injury but stressed KKR view him as a long-term successor to Andre Russell. Nayar said the franchise invests in players for their overall value, not short-term returns. He also backed Varun Chakaravarthy, saying the spinner is mentally strong and will bounce back despite recent struggles.

title: Census 2027 begins: President Murmu, PM Modi among leaders completing self-enumeration
content: President Droupadi Murmu, Vice President C.P. Radhakrishnan, Prime Minister Narendra Modi, and Union Home Minister Amit Shah have all participated in the self-enumeration for Census 2027. This initiative marks the commencement of the first phase, focusing on house listing and housing census, with a 15-day window for self-enumeration in Delhi starting Wednesday.

title: 'We will hit back': EPS on Stalin 'speaking ill'; slams TN CM for Cong alliance
content: AIADMK leader Edappadi K Palaniswami attacked CM MK Stalin at a rally, accusing him of forming alliances out of fear of defeat and alleging a breakdown of law and order. Palaniswami also criticized Stalin's use of language and warned of retaliation, while assuring financial support for Jallikattu events.

title: Watch: Rishabh Pant giggles after freak dismissal ends opening gamble in LSG vs DC
content: LSG skipper Rishabh Pant’s opening gamble backfired as he was run out for 7 in a freak dismissal during Lucknow Super Giants’ clash against Delhi Capitals. A deflection off Mukesh Kumar left him stranded. Delhi’s decision to bowl first paid off early, while Arjun Tendulkar remained absent from the squad.

title: Cardi B hid her pregnancy with Stefon Diggs from her best friends for this reason
content: Cardi B revealed her pregnancy, disrupting a planned "Hot Girl Summer" with best friends Ash Cash and Sweetness. The baby, nicknamed "Jersey," is with NFL star Stefon Diggs, though the couple reportedly split.  Her friends humorously reacted to the canceled plans, but a rescheduled "Hot Girl Summer" is now set for 2026.

title: Maharashtra: 8 women workers killed as truck collides with tempo on Jalna’s Samruddhi highway
content: Eight women workers were killed on the Nagpur-Mumbai Expressway in Jalna district, Maharashtra, after a truck collided with a tempo they were standing in. The truck driver, who changed lanes and struck the tempo from behind, has been taken into custody. Maharashtra Chief Minister Devendra Fadnavis expressed his condolences and announced Rs 5 lakh aid for the deceased's families.

title: Will Blake Lively & Ryan Reynolds attend Taylor Swift–Travis Kelce wedding?
content: Rumors suggest Blake Lively and Ryan Reynolds might miss Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding. A reported fallout over leaked private texts has strained the friendship. Insiders claim Swift feels exposed and used. Kelce reportedly supports Swift's decision to limit the guest list to trusted individuals. The wedding is scheduled for June 13th in Rhode Island.

title: PCB cracks down after PSL hotel security breach, issues new 24-hour guidelines
content: The Pakistan Cricket Board (PCB) has tightened security protocols for the Pakistan Super League (PSL) after a breach at a team hotel. Players now require 24-hour advance approval for family visits, with only immediate family allowed in rooms.

title: Mojtaba Khamenei praises ‘martyrdom’ of slain IRGC, Hezbollah commanders
content: Iran's Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei lauded fallen Hezbollah and IRGC commanders, viewing their sacrifices as proof of resistance against the US and Israel. He emphasized their commitment to the struggle, highlighting figures like Hassan Nasrallah and Qasem Soleimani. Khamenei reaffirmed Iran's unwavering support for resistance movements, calling the current period critical for the cause.

title: Viveck Vaswani slams Aryan Khan’s show, says SRK had a ‘golden spoon’
content: Aryan Khan’s debut series The Ba***ds of Bollywood has sparked a strong conversation online ever since its release. While the Netflix show has found its fans, it has also drawn criticism for its dark portrayal of the Hindi film industry. One of the sharpest reactions has come from Viveck Vaswani, who shares a long-standing association with Shah Rukh Khan dating back to his early days in Mumbai. Vaswani once again didn’t mince words as he questioned the narrative presented in the series.

title: April Fools: When stories looked real, sounded believable, & quietly fell apart
content: In early 2026, a surge of fake news, amplified by global tensions, tested public discernment. From claims of Benjamin Netanyahu's death to misleading videos of dog escapes and fabricated political encounters, misinformation spread rapidly. Fact-checkers and official sources worked to debunk these viral stories, highlighting the challenge of verifying information in the digital age.

title: Pushed out by Jyoti Basu, eclipsed by Mamata, crushed by BJP: Congress' 50-year exile in Bengal
content: Once a dominant force, West Bengal's Congress party has seen its influence dwindle significantly over five decades. From landslide victories to being overshadowed by communist rule and then Mamata Banerjee's Trinamool Congress, the party now struggles for relevance.

title: LPG crunch forces Pondicherry University to prepone exams, cut academic days
content: The Students Federation of India, Pondicherry University unit (SFI PU), condemned the arbitrary decision of the university to prepone the examinations and to direct the students to vacate the hostel.

title: 'Dhurandhar2' BO Day 14: Ranveer Singh film eyes Rs 1000 crore net milestone
content: 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge' has shattered records, officially crossing the Rs. 900 crore India net milestone. In just two weeks, the Aditya Dhar directorial has collected a staggering Rs.903.22 crore domestic net, surpassing the lifetime totals of almost every Indian blockbuster to date. Led by Ranveer Singh's career-defining performance as Hamza, the film has shown incredible resilience against the IPL 2026 matches, maintaining massive footfalls across theatres nationwide. With a current India gross of Rs. 1,081.31 crore and a global haul nearing Rs. 1,400 crore, the spy epic featuring Sanjay Dutt and Arjun Rampal is now chasing the historic Rs. 1,000 crore India net club.

title: Electricity Amendment Bill 2025: Why farmers, workers and states are pushing back
content: Nearly 27 lakh electricity workers are set to strike nationwide against the proposed Electricity (Amendment) Bill, 2025. The bill aims to introduce competition by allowing multiple distributors in one area, but faces opposition from workers, farmers, and unions concerned about privatization, job losses, and potential tariff hikes.

title: Happy Hanuman Jayanti 2025: Top 50 wishes, messages, quotes and images to share with friends
content: Festival mornings in India are a vibrant mix of family connections and spiritual energy, especially on Hanuman Jayanti. Beyond generic greetings, this article offers 65 heartfelt wishes for family, friends, and personal reflection. It emphasizes themes of protection, health, and unwavering devotion, encouraging readers to embrace the strength and peace Lord Hanuman represents.

title: UP Couple Dies By Suicide After Families Oppose Marriage: Cops
content: According to the police, the young couple, in their early 20s, took the extreme step as their families opposed to their marriage.

title: US Israel Iran War LIVE: Iranian President Questions Trump’s War Motives In Letter To Americans
content: US Israel Iran War News LIVE Updates: The United States and Israel continue to strike Iran, whose retaliatory attacks have targeted Israel and neighboring Gulf Arab states. More than 3,000 people have been killed.

title: Delhi Police Stop Cremation, Seize Woman's Body Over Suspicious Death
content: According to the police, the call was received at the Hari Nagar police station around 2 pm, prompting immediate deployment of a team to verify the allegations.

title: Ahead of Bengal Polls, Trinamool's Digital Push Goes Hyperlocal
content: At the centre of Trinamool's Digital push is the "Ami Banglar Digital Joddha" initiative - a campaign that blends technology, training, and local mobilisation to reshape political communication in the state.

content: The report also mentioned that Trump spoke about a possible ceasefire with Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman over a call on Wednesday.

title: Luthra Brothers Get Bail In Goa Nightclub Fire Case, But Will Stay In Jail
content: The Luthras face charges of negligence, endangering human life, and other offences, in connection with the deadly fire that erupted at their Goa nightclub.

title: 20 Merchant Vessels Attacked, 1,900 Ships Stranded: Navy Chief On Hormuz
content: Navy chief Admiral Dinesh K Tripathi also said that the daily traffic through the Strait of Hormuz has fallen sharply to six-seven transits, compared with a pre-conflict average of about 130.

title: Larger House Not Always Effective: Karti Chidambaram On More Lok Sabha Seats
content: "We will become like the chamber in North Korea or the People's Congress of China, where we will simply come and thump our desks and go away," Karti Chidambaram said

title: Congress Releases List Of 9 More Candidates For Bengal Polls, Replaces 1
content: The Congress on Wednesday announced its second list of nine candidates and one replacement for the West Bengal Assembly polls, taking the total number of candidates declared by the party to 293.

title: Gujarat Local Body Polls On April 26, Votes To Be Counted On April 28
content: Over 4.18 crore voters will be eligible to elect their representatives in a total of 9,992 seats across Gujarat, officials said.

title: SpaceX Confidentially Files For IPO, Could Be Largest-Ever Listing: Report
content: The Starbase, Texas-headquartered firm could seek to raise more than $50 billion in the IPO, handily surpassing the 2019 flotation of Saudi Aramco, which remains the largest IPO on record.

title: "Unemployment Rising, People Suffering": Priyanka Gandhi Attacks BJP In Assam
content: Priyanka Gandhi also alleged that women beneficiaries of the Orunodoi program were being forced into attending political rallies.

title: Delhi Man Robs 10 Lakhs From Own Home, Waves Gun At Father, Then Fires In Air
content: A man allegedly orchestrated a Rs 10 lakh robbery at his own house, threatening his father at gunpoint and firing several rounds in the air before fleeing with the cash in Delhi.

title: Mojtaba Khamenei Vows To Continue Support For Resistance Against Israel, US
content: In a message to Hezbollah's Sheikh Naim Qassem, Khamenei appreciated the "emotion, love and loyalty" shown by Hezbollah fighters.

title: Adani Ports Crosses 500-Million-Tonne Cargo Milestone
content: From a single port-led vision in 1998 to a network spanning 19 ports and terminals across India and beyond, Adani Ports and Special Economic Zone Ltd has grown into a critical enabler of India's trade, industrial growth and global competitiveness..

title: PM Modi, President Murmu Complete Self-Enumeration On First Day Of Census 2027
content: The first day of self-enumeration under Census 2027 in the national capital on Wednesday saw hundreds of persons including President Droupadi Murmu, Vice President C P Radhakrishnan and Prime Minister Narendra Modi taking part in the exercise.

title: Gujarat AAP Chief Isudan Gadhvi, Supporters Arrested After Clash At Police station
content: The police said Isudan Gadhvi and the others obstructed work, pushed police personnel, and used social media platforms like Facebook Live and WhatsApp to broadcast the commotion

title: Trump Open To Ceasefire If US Demands Met, JD Vance Tells Pak Intermediaries
content: At President Donald Trump's direction, Vance signalled privately that Trump was open to a ceasefire as long as certain US demands were met, including reopening the Strait of Hormuz, the source told Reuters on Wednesday.

title: Boxing divisional rankings: Moses Itauma crashes into heavyweight top 5
content: Moses Itauma disposed of Jermaine Franklin Jr. to move up at heavyweight. Here are the latest ESPN divisional rankings.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Liverpool eye Conceição as Salah replacement
content: Juventus winger Francisco Conceição has emerged as an option to replace Mohamed Salah at Liverpool. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Why new rules have Max Verstappen on the brink of walking away from F1
content: Max Verstappen predicted F1's new rule set would underwhelm, and 2026 is proving him correct, so much so that he might just quit the sport entirely.

title: Navy was minutes away from striking Pakistan from sea during Operation Sindoor: Admiral Tripathi
content: Operation Sindoor demonstrated exemplary readiness and resolve of the Indian Navy, as its units undertook swift deployment and maintained a highly aggressive posture throughout the period, says Mr. Tripathi

title: PM’s policies pushing country deeper into crisis, says Priyanka
content: Addressing party rallies in eastern Assam, the Congress leader says the people are tired of the ‘mafia and syndicate rule’ of the BJP-led government

title: Lok Sabha passes Jan Vishwas amendment Bill
content: It seeks to amend certain provisions in different laws for decriminalising and rationalising minor offences to further promote ease of doing business and living

title: In Bodoland, fight for peace, identity ‘unites’ political rivals BPF and UPPL
content: In the Bodoland Territorial Region, BPF in alliance with the BJP is taking on the UPPL, which till a few months ago was with the saffron party; while the UPPL blames the BPF for communal tension in the region, both concur on the need to protect the Bodo identity and have lasting peace

title: 55,000 households use Census self-enumeration portal on day one
content: In the first phase, comprehensive information on the condition of housing, household amenities and assets possessed will be collected, the Home Ministry said

title: Parliament may go into recess, meet on April 16
content: According to sources, the Lok Sabha Secretariat was asked to look at precedents when a session of Parliament was extended beyond its schedule to accommodate additional legislative business.

title: Hyderabad sees surge in customer enquiries for PNG connections
content: The rising demand coupled with the Centre’s push for PNG has meant City Gas Distribution entities in the country such as BGL doubling down on efforts to ramp up the pipeline network

title: Exclusion from rolls doesn’t repeal voting rights forever, says Supreme Court
content: Court asks Election Commission tribunals to ensure fair adjudication of electoral roll exclusions during Special Intensive Revision

title: Modi chairs Cabinet panel meet on West Asia crisis
content: The Prime Minister discusses availability of fertilizers and emphasises that all efforts must be made to protect citizens from the impact of the crisis

title: Kerala Assembly polls 2026 | There was no young candidate on NCP’s final list to challenge my candidature in Elathur: A.K. Saseendran
content: Forest Minister A.K. Saseendran, one of the seniormost leaders of the Left Democratic Front (LDF), is contesting from Elathur for the fourth consecutive time. In an interview with The Hindu, he responds to criticism about his decision to contest again instead of making way for a younger candidate, as well as the ongoing protest by a section of upland farmers who have fielded their own candidate against him, citing his alleged failures to address their concerns amid rising human-wildlife conflicts

title: Minister Duriamurugan’s vehicle inspected by election squad in Vellore
content: The Minister was said to have been accompanied by his son and Vellore MP D.M. Kathir Anand and Arakkonam DMK MP S. Jagathrakshakan

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: UDF team alleges that they were prevented from campaigning at Cheruvathur bus stand
content: Sandeep Warrier, the United Democratic Front candidate in Cheruvathur,  who reached the spot upon receiving information on the incident was allegedly blocked by CPI(M)-CITU workers

title: Karnataka Minister M.B. Patil writes to Centre seeking express train between Bengaluru and Vijayapura
content: With the completion of the 9.6-km double line railway work between Almatti and Wandal, which has been opened for traffic since March 25, Karnataka Minister M.B. Patil has sought the introduction of a long-pending express train service between Bengaluru and Vijayapura

title: Amit Shah asks Manipur CM to accelerate peace process, approves formation of all-woman police battalion
content: Zomi community leaders warn of phased and coordinated agitations over “delay in justice” for MLA who died following a mob assault.

title: Karnataka Transport Department misses revenue target by 14%
content: Tax concessions provided to electric vehicle registrations and concessions extended to certain categories of vehicles dragged down the revenue of the Transport Department as it missed the target by 14%

title: GST collection in Karnataka grows by 11.6%
content: In a year where the GST rate rationalisation threw up a huge challenge, Karnataka received ₹87,256 crore as part of the SGST, and the SGST portion of the IGST settlement during 2025-2026

title: Evangelical Fellowship calls for consultations on FCRA regulations
content: It calls for the law to be upheld “in ways that are fair, proportionate, and do not undermine institutions serving vulnerable communities”

title: Karnataka’s Stamps and Registrations Department sees revenue up, but target not met
content: Amid problems in the registration of properties over e-khata, revenue collection from registrations increased by 13.31% even as the Department of Stamps and Registration failed to meet the target set for the financial year

title: 11.94% increase in Excise revenue in Karnataka despite drop in beer sales
content: Karnataka reported 11.94% increase in Excise revenue collection despite a steep drop in the sale of beer, which has been attributed to a long spell of rain coupled with floods and a marginal dip in sale of Indian Made Liquor

title: Commercial LPG prices hiked 10%, jet fuel rates up 9% for domestic airlines
content: ATF rates for international flights more than doubled, prompting IndiGo to add a fuel surcharge of ₹10,000 on long-haul routes; Centre says OMCs are still absorbing losses due to the surge in global crude rates

title: Bring back J&K resident’s son deported to Pakistan, Jammu and Kashmir High Court tells Home Ministry
content: Father says that after the Pahalgam attack, police raided his house, forcibly detained his son and deported him to Pakistan

title: Assembly Election highlights: PM Modi speaks in Assam, Rajnath Singh holds campaign in Kerala, and more
content: Addressing poll rallies, PM claims Congress plans to enact communal violence law that is unfair to Hindus; vows to protect Assamese identity, predicts a hat-trick win for NDA in Assembly election

title: Doctor couple charged under UAPA in Kashmir for spreading ‘misinformation on social media’
content: The accused, according to the police, were also involved in uploading and circulating content intended to create disharmony and criminal ill-will among different religious groups

title: Modi plans FTA push with Europe this summer, fast-tracking implementation on cards
content: Officials finalising dates for PM travel to Nordic Summit in Norway, G-7 in France and to Netherlands in May and June

title: Mamata did nothing for Muslims in West Bengal, says Owaisi
content: Muslims want to free themselves from the fear of Modi and Mamata, says AIMIM leader Asaduddin Owaisi as he launches election campaign with AJUP chief Humayun Kabir

title: Hope for Bengal electors pending under adjudication, but uncertainty over redressal at tribunals
content: West Bengal may see the 2026 Assembly election with far fewer electors than in 2024 Lok Sabha polls (7.60 crore) and 2021 Assembly polls (7.34 crore). Current electoral roll stands at 7.04 crore, including 60 lakh cases under adjudication, with about 40% rejections.

title: NSCN-K aims at religious conversion, demographic consolidation, Arunachal government tells UAPA tribunal
content: The group intends to ‘bring all the sub-tribes under one banner Tangsang-Naga’ and ‘this is indicative of a deeper conspiracy to create homogenous demographic structure’, tribunal told

title: KSRTC’s training programmes earn World HRD Congress Award
content: The award recognises KSRTC’s extensive and structured training initiatives implemented across its five training centres

title: H.S. Phoolka, who fought for anti-Sikh riot victims, joins BJP
content: In 2019, H.S. Phoolka was awarded the Padma Shri in recognition of his decades-long legal battle to secure justice for the victims of the 1984 riots

title: Government skips FCRA amendment Bill; Rijiju accuses Opposition of spreading ‘wrong things’ before Kerala polls
content: Parliamentary Affairs Minister Kiren Rijiju says the Bill, introduced last month, seeks to protect national security and interest, asserting that it is not aimed at any religion or organisation

title: KKCCI seeks early resumption of flight services from Kalaburagi

title: UConn odds-on title favorite, 1-seeds all that remain in women's tournament

title: How a desi attorney is fighting Trump's order on birthright citizenship
content: attorney Smita Ghosh has emerged as a central intellectual architect behind the defense of the Fourteenth Amendment to the US Constitution . she is expected to play a significant role in how the justices approach a case that could redefine the meaning of US citizenship . her work is rooted in early American legal tradition .

title: Man gets 10-yr RI for raping deaf & mute woman
content:
.

JAMMU: A fast-track court in J&K’s Ramban has sentenced a man to 10 years of rigorous imprisonment for raping and impregnating a deaf and mute woman in 2020. Judge Pardeep K Sandhu also fined the convict, Abdul Qayoom, Rs 10,000 on Tuesday. Qayoom raped the woman several times and threatened to kill her if she revealed the assault to anyone, the prosecution said. However, the matter came to light when she became pregnant, prompting her family to file a police complaint. The survivor identified the convict during an identification parade in the presence of a magistrate.

End of Article

title: 2026 rankings: Profiling the top 35 QBs
content: the 2024 NFL MVP has finished in the top 10 in passing TDs six seasons in a row and remains a major threat with his legs . despite seeing less passing volume the past two seasons (14th or lower in pass attempts both years), he has finished second among quarterbacks in fantasy points . his 21.4 fantasy points per game in 2025 was actually his lowest since 2019 .

title: Trump attends SC argument on birthright citizenship in unprecedented appearance
content: president Donald Trump attended the supreme court hearing in the birthright citizenship case . critics saw his appearance as an attempt to intimidate the nine justices . at the heart of the case is Trump’s executive order that seeks to dismantle the long-standing interpretation of the 14th Amendment .

title: Humans return to the Moon’s doorstep: Just hours to go for Artemis II launch
content: Chethan Kumar is a Senior Assistant Editor with the Times of India. Aside from specialising in Space & Science, he has reported extensively on varied topics, with special focus on defence, policy and data stories. He has covered multiple elections, too. As a young democracy grows out of adolescence, Chethan feels, there are reels of tales emerging which need to be captured. To do this, he alternates between the mundane goings-on of the Common Man and the wonder-filled worlds of scientists and scamsters, politicians and soldiers. In a career spanning nearly 18 years, he has reported from multiple datelines — Houston, Florida, Kochi, Hyderabad, Chennai, Sriharikota (AP), NH-1 (J&K Highway), New Delhi, Ahmedabad, Raichur, Bhatkal, Mysuru, Chamarajanagar, to name a few —  but is based out of Bengaluru, India’s science capital that also hosts the ISRO HQ. title: Stewart, Ionescu say they'll re-sign with Liberty
content: two-time WNBA MVP and three-time league champion Breanna Stewart will be re-signing with the New York Liberty in free agency . she announced on her podcast, "Game Recognize Game with Stewie and Myles" she will be staying in new york, according to her podcast . her teammate, the Liberty's no. 1 overall draft pick in 2020, also said she intends to return to new york .
